message:
chore(beads): close 8 completed beads after audit

Closed after verifying implementations and tests exist:
- process_triage-s8s.1.2 (token-efficient output modes)
- process_triage-2ka.1.2 (responsive TUI layouts)
- process_triage-7bfx (container-aware process grouping)
- process_triage-nh7p (daemon core loop)
- process_triage-hc7.1 (fleet session manager)
- process_triage-aii.3 (dormant daemon E2E tests)
- process_triage-j9s4 (installation/update/rollback E2E tests)
- process_triage-m46d (agent ergonomics contract E2E tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
